title: Add Pinnacle Safety Award Content to Media Page
assignees: Bogdan Zakharchyshyn, Johan Cilliers, Jordan, Mubeen Dildar-Mia
description:
Adding SEO to this DEV task. Please check if the content provided by the client is ok to use or if it needs to be optimized.
________________________


URL: https://theexteriorcompany.com/
Media Center: https://theexteriorcompany.com/media-center/
 
The Exterior Company was awarded a nationally recognized Pinnacle Safety award by Owens Corning 2 weeks ago.

Please post the attached content write-up that the client provided to the media page. The client says the content "can be tweaked-gladly!" if necessary.


Background on the awards by OC: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=vXwd92Z13UA&t=4s

description:
This site needs to be launched as soon as possible.

https://theexteriorcompany.clixsysites.com/

title: Add 2nd check box on forms
description:
Please add a 2nd check box for their forms on the site. Same as what was done to the Integrity forms.
 theexteriorcompany.com 

Texts to use:
By submitting, you authorize Integrity Roofing & Construction to reach out via phone, email, or text for explicit information about project needs. We will never share your personal information with 3rd parties for marketing purposes or spam you. You can opt out at any time. Message/data rates apply. Consent is not a condition of purchase. 


Thanks much

title: Add new video to site
description:
Hi the client sent us a new video to be added to their site. They did not mention where they want it added though.
https://theexteriorcompany.com/

Video to add: https://youtu.be/up_KycwR0o8?si=tjGk6jtInKz95ZLf

I checked on their site and saw that they have a media page:  https://theexteriorcompany.com/media-center/
Can we add the video here please?

cc for advice where SEO may also be able to use the video please so we can also ask the DEV team to add this there too :)

Thanks so much!

title: Add email to form
description:
Seeking help with a client request for their form submission please.
 theexteriorcompany.com

The client noticed when they checked their site that the forms are not going to their email address. Can we change to this one please?
info@theexteriorcompany.com  

Thanks much!

title: Yelp Pixels Ready for Implementation query
assignees: Barnes, Keith Bruss, Matthew Nyahari, Predrag
description:
Hi opening this query task if this can be done on the site. Adding the verbatim and attachments to be sure:
https://theexteriorcompany.com/

Client said: We work with Yelp to enhance our profiles and promote ourselves on the platform. Many of the features we receive include extensive tracking from Yelp to the website. I believe he has attached the instructions and code here for proper tracking. Could your team review this and see if this is possible for us? 

Good morning! You can find the pixels for implementation attached. Please note that there are multiple tabs for the global and conversion pixels. We have also included some basic instructions in the attachment.

The conversion pixels will track "click to calls", "Get a free estimate scheduler clicks", and completed form fills.

To help expedite the Q/A process:
* Please confirm how many daily average conversions you see on the site?

Please confirm once the pixels have been implemented so we can ensure they are firing appropriately. Let me know if I can answer any questions.



Thanks much!

title: Urgent Issue: ReCaptcha
description:
Hi seeking help w/ a client urgent issue:  https://theexteriorcompany.com/

Can this be fixed from our end?


Client said: Finance has notified them that users are not able to make payments on our website due to an error on the Recapta featured on both forms on ACH and Credit Card

Thanks much

cc
